step_by_step_thinking:
Adeno ameloblastoma, being a benign yet locally aggressive tumor, primarily necessitates thorough surgical excision with adequate margins to prevent recurrence. Given the options presented:
\boxed{A} Enbloc resection of maxilla provides an appropriate approach considering the requirement for large margins (\geq 10mm) to manage the locally aggressive nature effectively while ensuring complete removal.

raw_response:
Adeno ameloblastoma, being a benign yet locally aggressive tumor, primarily necessitates thorough surgical excision with adequate margins to prevent recurrence. Given the options presented:
\boxed{A} Enbloc resection of maxilla provides an appropriate approach considering the requirement for large margins (\geq 10mm) to manage the locally aggressive nature effectively while ensuring complete removal.
```plaintext
\boxed{A}
```
This selection aligns with the recommendation for performing en bloc resection with a sufficiently wide margin for effective control and prevention of recurrence in adeno ameloblastomas.
